narrative:
Benton Twp township has 1,873 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a clear Republican lean of 9.5 percentage points.
